summary: recurring requires a regular cadence (mean in [2,400] days, bounded gap spread) and excludes settlement-labeled expenses.
reason: recurring reported any description seen >= min-occurrences times as recurring with a meaningless mean-gap cadence, surfacing trips, same-trip bursts, and settle-up records (which Splitwise stores as payment=false so the e.Payment filter missed them). Added the recurringCadence regularity gate and isSettlementDescription, aligned the deleted-expense check with expenseDeleted(), and raised the min-occurrences default to 3.
